memory.summary: I planned to analyze the assignment first, but a friend invited me to lunch. With high stress and sleep debt, joining them seems like a priority.
I completed half the analysis work, then saw my cohort gathering for an order. Given my stress and sleep debt, I'll likely join them soon.
I have no assignment to work on, so I cannot proceed with my analysis. My current energy and stress levels suggest I should rest or join social activities instead.
I let the moment pass with no changes, but time is passing while my analysis section still needs work before 18:00.
I spent two hours on the analysis, improving progress from 0.58 to 0.72, but it remains incomplete as the deadline approaches in under an hour.
No matching task 'assignment_A' exists, so my progress on the analysis is stalled despite prior work. I must confirm if this task has been removed or relocated before proceeding.
I worked 2 hours to reach 0.83 progress, but the 18:00 deadline passed with the task unfinished and no matching task found in memory.
I completed the analysis section, but missed the reading deadline and still lack a confirmed task ID to continue.
Despite missing the deadline and lacking a task ID, I successfully advanced analysis progress to 0.96 after two hours of work.
I missed the 18:00 deadline and am now at 0.96 progress with zero energy, having exhausted my options to continue without a task ID.
The analysis section is now complete, but I remain exhausted and without a task ID to proceed further.
Letting the moment pass confirmed I cannot proceed without a task ID. My exhaustion and stress remain high with no way to advance.
